summary: Comprehensive testing of P2P Marketplace 'Reptiloid' shop features. All 7 requested features tested and working correctly: product purchase, my purchases with content display, balance lock, shop block/unblock, and shop messaging.
seed_data_creation: Created test purchase of 'гекон' product for 1 USDT
context_for_next_testing_agent: All shop features tested and working. Shop ID for trader: a9bed1fb-a63e-4cfe-aae9-f6b12d08df96. Buyer ID: c27b5ca8-d6e7-40fa-990e-80c607403966. Products 'Чек' (23 USDT) and 'гекон' (1 USDT) are available in marketplace.

1_product_purchase.notes: Successfully purchased 'гекон' for 1 USDT, received content 'варыры'

3_balance_lock.notes: Locked user correctly blocked from creating offers with message 'Ваш баланс заблокирован'

4_shop_block.notes: Blocked shop products (2) disappear from marketplace (0)

5_shop_unblock.notes: Unblocked shop products (2) reappear in marketplace

7_shop_owner_view_messages.notes: Shop owner can view all conversations with messages

ui_verification.marketplace_page: Products displayed correctly with 2 product cards
ui_verification.my_purchases_page: Shows purchase with product name, price, status, and delivered content
ui_verification.seller_shop_panel: Shows shop balance, products, orders, messages tabs
